EntryText: John Greate of the Crowne in Redcros streete Brewer enrolled two bay horses, their Riders Abraham Teyler and Roger Bridges, armed w[i]th Carabines pistolls Backes Brests and headpeeces one of the said horses and armes valued at 34 [pounds] the other at 26 [pounds] in all £60 - 0 - 0

John Greate of the Crowne in Redcros streete Brewer enrolled two bay horses, their Riders Abraham Teyler and Roger Bridges, armed w[i]th Carabines pistolls Backes Brests and headpeeces one of the said horses and armes valued at 34 [pounds] the other at 26 [pounds] in all £60 - 0 - 0
William Rowley of Sallap Draper listed one tall grey geldinge his rider Stephen Sleigh, armed w[i]th Carbine pistolls buffe Coate and sword £25 - 0 - 0

Thomas Noell of Noble streete goldsmith registred one bay horse, and one bay geldinge w[i]th one wall eye and a starr in his forehead, his Riders Edward Robinson and Gregory Short armed w[i]th Carabines pistolls buffe coats and swords the gelding and his Armes valued at 26 [pounds] and the horse and his Armes at 24 [pounds] £50 - 0 - 0
